en: The survivors of Rhino Squad have made their way into the Strogg fortress ahead.  Hurry up and join them.
zh: Rhino 小队的幸存者已经进入前方的 Strogg 要塞。赶快与他们会合。

en: Find Anderson, Rhino Squad's medic.  Bring him back to the wounded marine near Sgt. Miller.
zh: 找到 Rhino 小队的医疗兵 Anderson，把他带回 Miller 中士附近那名受伤的陆战队员身边。
摧毁 Strogg 飞行器机库

en: Strogg Flyers have Rhino Squad hopelessly pinned down.  Take Morris to the hangar and kill the problem at the root.
zh: Strogg 飞行器把 Rhino 小队压制得毫无还手之力。带 Morris 前往机库，从根源上解决问题。

en: Find a way to get to the other side of the glass.
zh: 设法绕到玻璃墙的另一侧。

en: Marine ground units are being shredded by Strogg air support. Find a way to take out the Strogg hangars.
zh: 陆战队地面部队正被 Strogg 的空中支援打得七零八落。设法摧毁 Strogg 机库。

en: Prepare this floor for the demolition team by sweeping the area and clearing it of all hostiles.
zh: 扫荡本层区域，肃清所有敌人，为爆破小组做好准备。

en: Lead Rhodes to the hangars and protect him as he sets the demolition charges.
zh: 带领 Rhodes 前往机库，并在他安放爆破炸药时保护他。

en: Return to the Air Defense Cannon and regroup with Lt. Voss and the members of Rhino Squad.
zh: 返回防空炮，与 Voss 中尉及 Rhino 小队成员会合。

en: Fight your way to the cannon's controls and take it offline to clear the skies for the Mobile Command Center.
zh: 杀出一条血路，抵达防空炮的控制台并使其停机，为移动指挥中心扫清空域。

en: Go to the Mobile Command Center's landing zone and rendezvous with the Hannibal as it lands.
zh: 前往移动指挥中心的着陆区，在汉尼拔号降落时与其会合。
D.4 简报室 | 军械库

en: Make your way through the Hannibal and find Rhino Squad's briefing room for your next mission.
zh: 穿过汉尼拔号舰内，找到 Rhino 小队的简报室，接受你的下一项任务。
D.4 医疗舱 | 中央指挥部

en: Report to Drop Pod Launch Bay
zh: 前往空投舱发射区报到

en: Hightail it to the drop pod launch center and fire yourself towards the Storage tower.
zh: 火速赶往空投舱发射中心，把自己发射向储存塔。

en: Locate Voss for your next mission.
zh: 找到 Voss，接受你的下一项任务。

en: Clear out the emplaced turrets surrounding the building ahead of you.
zh: 清除前方建筑物周围部署的固定炮塔。

en: Meet up with CPL Spencer and get a ride to Rhino Squad's convoy.
zh: 与 Spencer 下士会合，搭车前往 Rhino 小队的车队。

en: Use the mounted weaponry on the truck to protect the convoy from Strogg attack.
zh: 使用卡车上的车载武器，保护车队免遭 Strogg 袭击。

en: Find a way out of the building and regroup with Rhino Squad at the Nexus Hub.
zh: 设法离开这栋建筑，前往 Nexus 枢纽与 Rhino 小队会合。

en: Enter the basement of this building and locate the convoy that is pinned down there.  Locate the engineer that is attached to the squad.
zh: 进入这栋建筑的地下室，找到被困在那里的车队，并找到配属该小队的工程师。

en: Return to the entrance of the facility and find the hover tank waiting there.
zh: 返回设施入口，找到在那里待命的悬浮坦克。

en: Find a way to the Perimeter Control Room and shut down the laser grid to allow the convoy to proceed to the Nexus Hub.
zh: 设法抵达外围控制室，关闭激光网，让车队得以继续前往 Nexus 枢纽。
与 Strauss 一起摧毁四元节点（Tetranode）

en: Take the crawlspace to meet up with Strauss and destroy the Tetranode by hand.
zh: 钻过检修通道与 Strauss 会合，亲手摧毁四元节点。

en: Escort the EMP to directly under the Tetranode and destroy it.
zh: 护送 EMP 装置至四元节点正下方，将其摧毁。

en: Escort and protect Strauss to the Tetranode's power plant.
zh: 护送 Strauss 前往四元节点的发电厂，并保护他的安全。
找到紧急关闭控制装置

en: Escort and protect Strauss to the Emergency Shutoff Controls.
zh: 护送 Strauss 前往紧急关闭控制装置，并保护他的安全。

en: Use the data routers to rewire and shut down the emergency controls for the Tetranode.
zh: 利用数据路由器重新接线，关闭四元节点的紧急控制系统。

en: Find the coolant pumps used to keep the Tetranode from overheating and shut them down.
zh: 找到用于防止四元节点过热的冷却泵，并将其关闭。

en: The machinery has opened a new way to go. Return to the machine and exit the medical facility through the newly created path.
zh: 机械装置开辟出了一条新通路。回到那台机器旁，经由新开辟的通道离开医疗设施。

en: Use the medical machinery to your advantage and find a way through the facility.
zh: 善加利用医疗机械，设法穿过这处设施。

en: Regroup with Voss and the rest of the Rhino Squad somewhere deeper in the medical laboratories facility.
zh: 前往医疗实验设施更深处，与 Voss 和 Rhino 小队其余成员会合。

en: Follow the marine escort to safety.
zh: 跟随护送你的陆战队员前往安全地带。

en: Find the command overlook and extend the bridge.
zh: 找到指挥瞭望台，展开桥梁。

en: Find the command overlook that is used to extend the bridge.
zh: 找到用于展开桥梁的指挥瞭望台。

en: Meet up with the rest of the marines at the Waste center of the Stroyent Dispersal Facility.
zh: 在 Stroyent 疏散设施的废料区与其余陆战队员会合。

en: Reset the Stroyent Injection System--you wouldn't survive the process.
zh: 重置 Stroyent 注入系统——你可挺不过那道工序。

en: The mutated heart seems to pump fluid throughout the pipes in the dispersal facility.  Overcharge it to drain the pool and exit deeper into the building.
zh: 这颗变异的心脏似乎在为疏散设施中的管道泵送流体。让它过载以排空水池，然后深入建筑内部。
摧毁 Stroyent 加工生物

en: Find a way to destroy the creature that controls the flow of fluids through the Stroyent Dispersal Facility.
zh: 设法摧毁控制 Stroyent 疏散设施内流体输送的生物。

en: Meet up with the rest of the marines at the Waste center of the Stroyent Dispersal Facility.
zh: 在 Stroyent 疏散设施的废料区与其余陆战队员会合。

en: Find the barrel sterilization controls and reboot the system
zh: 找到料桶消毒控制装置并重启系统。

en: Work with Sasaki to try and find an exit from the Recomposition Station.
zh: 与 Sasaki 合作，设法找到离开再造中心的出口。

en: Sasaki can get you both out of here if you activate the barrel processing assembly line.  Make your way to the control room while Sasaki stays behind.
zh: 只要启动料桶加工装配线，Sasaki 就能带你们俩离开这里。让 Sasaki 留在原地，你自己前往控制室。

en: Sasaki is gone.  Use the control system to build a path to the upper ledge and escape.
zh: Sasaki 已经不在了。利用控制系统搭出一条通往上层平台的路，然后逃出去。

en: Find a way to deactivate the laser scanner so the rest of the survivors can get through.
zh: 设法关闭激光扫描器，让其余幸存者得以通过。

en: Locate Rhodes and continue on with your mission.
zh: 找到 Rhodes，继续执行你的任务。

en: Gain access to the hangar control room and open both sets of doors.
zh: 进入机库控制室，打开两道大门。

en: Find a way to open the terminal hangar doors to allow the marine ships to enter the terminal.
zh: 设法打开终端站的机库大门，让陆战队飞船得以进入终端站。

en: Get down to Distribution and reactivate the torso storage devices.  Then return to the hangar.
zh: 下到配送区，重新启动躯干储存装置（TSD），然后返回机库。

en: Locate the security station - There is one security station in each terminal that must be disabled to gain access to the Core
zh: 找到安保站——每座终端站内各有一处安保站，必须将其全部瘫痪，才能进入核心。

en: Reactivate the Torso Storage Device (TSD) transfer system to bring the power back online.
zh: 重新启动躯干储存装置（TSD）的传输系统，恢复电力供应。

en: Find a tram in order to get to the Data Processing Tower.
zh: 找到一辆电车，前往数据处理塔。

en: Activate the hub station to rotate the tram on to the correct course.
zh: 启动枢纽站，将电车旋转到正确的线路上。

en: Redirect repair bots to repair the broken tram rail.
zh: 调派维修机器人修复损坏的电车轨道。

en: Keep the strogg off your back so the tram can reach Data Processing in one piece.
zh: 顶住 Strogg 的攻势，让电车完好无损地抵达数据处理塔。

en: Return Power to the Processing Tower
Find a way to bring the Data Processing Tower back on-line.
zh: 设法让数据处理塔恢复运转。

en: Call down the elevator in the room ahead, it will allow you and Sledge to reach the top levels.
zh: 把前方房间的电梯呼叫下来，你和 Sledge 就能乘它抵达顶层。

en: Make your way back to the tram station and get to the Data Networking Tower.
zh: 返回电车站，前往数据网络塔。

en: Activate the laser coupling, this will allow the beam on the roof to be activated later
zh: 启动激光耦合器，这样稍后才能启动屋顶上的光束。

en: Escort Sledge to the teleport bay, the Strogg will never know what hit them.
zh: 护送 Sledge 前往传送舱，打 Strogg 一个措手不及。

en: Head to the roof and activate the final antenna that will connect this building to the Core building.
zh: 前往屋顶，启动最后一座天线，将这栋建筑与核心塔连接起来。

en: Work your way up through the tower to the roof to activate the connection to the Core building.
zh: 在塔内一路向上直至屋顶，启动与核心塔的连接。

en: Battle your way to the top of the Data Networking Tower and activate the final antenna that will connect this building to the Core building.
zh: 杀上数据网络塔的塔顶，启动最后一座天线，将这栋建筑与核心塔连接起来。

en: Activate the final teleporter connecting the terminals to the central Core tower.
zh: 启动最后一座传送器，将各终端站与中央核心塔连通。

en: In order to destroy the teleporter you must destroy the four tubes which connect it.
zh: 要摧毁传送器，必须先摧毁与之相连的四根导管。

en: You must locate and destroy the Nexus.
zh: 你必须找到并摧毁 Nexus。

en: Find an elevator which goes deeper down into the core
zh: 找到一部通往核心更深处的电梯。

en: Board the Hannibal via the main lift, then report to mission briefing for your next deployment.
zh: 乘主升降梯登上汉尼拔号，然后前往任务简报室报到，接受下一次部署。

en: Some of the data nodes are out of alignment and may impede progress. You will need to realign these nodes to allow access to the roof.
zh: 部分数据节点发生错位，可能会阻碍你前进。你需要重新校准这些节点，才能通往屋顶。

en: Help Scorpion Squad raise the bridge. From there you can proceed to the tram hub area.
zh: 协助 Scorpion 小队升起桥梁。之后你就可以前往电车枢纽区。

en: The Makron has shutdown access to your position.  You'll have to find a way into the security tower to shut down the alarm to gain further access to the Core.
zh: Makron 已封锁通往你所在位置的通道。你必须设法进入安保塔关闭警报，才能继续深入核心。

en: Escort Strauss to the temperature controls.
zh: 护送 Strauss 前往温度控制装置。

en: Find the console that will deactivate the forcefield and allow the convoy to pull forward.
zh: 找到可以关闭力场的控制台，让车队得以继续前进。

en: Protect Anderson and bring him back to the wounded marine near Sgt. Miller.
zh: 保护 Anderson，把他带回 Miller 中士附近那名受伤的陆战队员身边。

en: Guide Newberry back up the elevator and locate the locked door that he needs to open.
zh: 带 Newberry 乘电梯返回上层，找到需要他打开的那扇上锁大门。

en: Take the elevator located in the central shaft back down to the tram station and make your way to the Data Processing Tower.
zh: 乘中央竖井内的电梯下到电车站，然后前往数据处理塔。

en: Return to the elevator and meet Rhodes, the Rhino Squad Engineer.
zh: 返回电梯处，与 Rhino 小队的工程师 Rhodes 会合。

en: Find Bidwell in the corridors ahead to receive your next mission objective.
zh: 在前方的走廊里找到 Bidwell，接收你的下一个任务目标。

en: Find a way out of the Strogg Medical Facility.
zh: 设法离开 Strogg 医疗设施。

en: The most direct path to the Waste facility is through the bowels of a nearby Strogg industrial processing complex, the Dispersal facility. Fight your way to the Dispersal entrance.
zh: 通往废料处理厂最直接的路线，要穿过附近一座 Strogg 工业处理综合体——疏散设施——的腹地。杀出一条血路，抵达疏散设施入口。
任务关键载具已被摧毁。

en: Use the commandeered cannon to make your own path to the Hannibal's landing site.
zh: 使用夺来的火炮，为自己轰开一条通往汉尼拔号着陆点的道路。

en: Strauss has fully deactivated Core Security.  Make your way back down to the Core Teleporter to enter the Core.
zh: Strauss 已完全解除核心安保。返回下方的核心传送器，进入核心。
